title: I like What These Young Fellas are Doin
intro: Group of artists breaking into the scene.

songs.title: Forget me Not .
songs.review: Super hypnotic beat from fakemink. This is a kinda dark love song

songs.title: North Pole
songs.review: Found this on TikTok, very catchy beat + flow.

songs.title: All I Want
songs.review: The whole song he's using the title of the track to tease the full chorus which only happens once. He repeadtly says: All I want-, just to cut himself off. The pay off is worth when we finaly get the chorus.
